metadata.title: Nailing a Perfect 2v1 on Icebox with Smart Angles and Calm Aim
metadata.description:
Here’s a tight 2v1 clutch on Icebox where careful positioning and timing made all the difference. Watch the smooth peeks and precise shots that sealed the round. What's your favorite clutch spot on Icebox?

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
